description: Style Note tonga delivers a great range of choices for the young fashionable woman. Colour-pops and unique designs add a playful edge to day-wear. Sweet hues and romantic trends bring out the best in you. So grab your favourite piece today before they run out! Product Details Crafted in fine fabric this trendy dress from Tonga is sleeveless with a scooped neckline with a pleated look on the right side of the dress Material and Care 92% polyester and 8% spandex Hand wash cold Do not bleach Hang or line dry Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
